dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Operations overview
dashboard.description: Your equine dental operations platform. Manage enquiries, plan routes, and track appointments — all in one place.

enquiries.title: Enquiries
enquiries.subtitle: Manage inbound enquiries
enquiries.empty: No enquiries yet. Inbound messages from WhatsApp and email will appear here.

customers.title: Customers
customers.subtitle: Manage customers and yards
customers.empty: No customers yet. Customers will be created when enquiries are received.

routeRuns.title: Route Runs
routeRuns.subtitle: Plan and manage visit routes
routeRuns.empty: No route runs yet. Routes will be generated from the planning pool.

appointments.title: Appointments
appointments.subtitle: Track and manage appointments
appointments.empty: No appointments yet. Appointments are created when routes are approved.
